message:
fix(clippy): Resolve all clippy warnings with --all-features

Fix 33+ clippy lints across ftui-extras and ftui-widgets:
- Remove unused UnicodeWidthChar import (console.rs)
- Replace clone() on Copy type Style with direct copy (console.rs)
- Use repeat_n() instead of repeat().take() (console.rs)
- Collapse nested if statements using if-let chains (charts.rs,
  clipboard.rs, forms.rs, paragraph.rs)
- Fix field_reassign_with_default in tests (forms.rs, markdown.rs,
  form_combining_repro.rs)
- Add #[allow] for too_many_arguments and dead_code (forms.rs, lib.rs)
- Fix unused assignment in tracing_tests.rs
- Use draw_text_span_with_link for calls with link_url (paragraph.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
